resources.string: One image or video, correctly split across both Thor screens.
Splits one image continuously across the Thor\'s two screens, with an optional slow Ken Burns pan/zoom.
Pick an image, GIF, or video - the app detects which one it is and sets the mode automatically.
That file type isn\'t supported - pick an image, GIF, or video
GIF set - ready to apply as your live wallpaper

GIF search uses GIPHY\'s public API, which needs your own free key (Tenor/Google stopped issuing new API keys in Jan 2026, so GIPHY is the option that still works for a new app). Tap \"Get a key\" to sign up on their site, then paste it below.
Each screen gets its own independent crop of the same photo, so the small bottom screen isn\'t just a duplicated sliver. Turn off for one continuous image that flows across the hinge instead.

The Thor\'s screens are used landscape and the app already accounts for that correctly - this should stay at 0° for normal use. It\'s here as a manual escape hatch only: if a firmware update or a different Thor variant ever needs a rotation nudge, cycle this and re-apply until it looks right.

Once applied, the wallpaper runs as its own Android system service and keeps going even after you close this app - that part is automatic. Some phone makers\' battery managers are aggressive about killing background apps though, which can affect this too. Exempting ThorPaper from battery optimization helps prevent that.
Couldn\'t open battery settings - check Settings ▸ Battery ▸ Unrestricted apps manually
Swap screen order (if it comes out backwards)
Smooth (fills each screen fully, not split)
Off (default): correctly split across the hinge like your images, but motion is a choppier slideshow. On: full smooth video, but both screens show the same full frame instead of a continuous split.
If the Thor\'s launcher doesn\'t offer the second screen a live wallpaper of its own, use Export, then assign each PNG manually through the system wallpaper picker for that screen.
Shown at the Thor\'s real 1920×1080 / 1240×1080 landscape screen proportions
Open Settings ▸ Wallpaper and pick ThorPaper manually
